commits: 6f9e0d6e: feat(editor): add YAML file editing and extension selection dialog
summary: TDD implementation complete for Issue #646. Added YAML file editing support (.yaml/.yml) with dangerous tag validation, created NewFileDialog with extension selection dropdown replacing window.prompt, generalized MarkdownEditor for text-only mode, and added YAML routing in FilePanelContent. All 331 unit test files pass (6271 tests), 12 new integration tests pass, TypeScript type check and ESLint both clean.
